name: MaintenanceDeluxe
overview: Premium maintenance overlay for Jellyfin with live countdown and rich release notes.
description: Display a premium, calm, cinema-themed maintenance overlay to your Jellyfin users. Features a live countdown, a time-based progress bar, admin-configurable release notes sections (with icons, titles, and markdown), and a TV-friendly design with graceful degradation on low-end devices. Forked from JellyFlare (GPL-3.0).

versions.changelog: v0.1.5 - Critical syntax fix. v0.1.4 had a JS SyntaxError (duplicated metal-border CSS block leaked into the preview badge array), the whole banner.js failed to parse, so nothing ran. This release removes the duplicated block. ALSO contains all v0.1.4 features: SPA navigation listeners (hashchange/popstate/viewshow) so the overlay re-attaches on login page SPA navigation, MutationObserver that re-attaches the overlay if React removes it, sessionStorage fallback for preview flag.
